steps.title: Find the y intercept
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs when $x=0$. Substitute $0$ into the equation.
$$y=250(4)^{2(0)}$$
$$y=250(4)^0=250$$

steps.title: Interpret the starting time
steps.content: The variable $x$ counts six-month periods starting from the end of March 2001, so $x=0$ represents the end of March 2001. This is before any six-month periods have passed. The graph starts with $250$ subscribers then. The answer is B.
